description: This file defines an OkHttp Interceptor class 'AuthHeaderInterceptor' which attaches a Bearer token to outgoing HTTP requests if a token exists in the TokenStore, excluding requests to auth endpoints. It implements logic to synchronously retrieve the token and conditionally add an authorization header.

classes.name: AuthHeaderInterceptor
classes.description: An OkHttp interceptor that adds an Authorization header with Bearer token if available, excluding auth endpoints.

methods.name: intercept
methods.description: Intercepts outgoing requests, adds Authorization header if a token is available, and bypasses auth endpoints.
